recentArticles.title: Machine Gun Kelly Shares Adorable Video Montage of His and Megan Fox's Daughter Saga During Tour Opener: 'Wish I Was With Mine Right Now' - AOL.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Machine Gun Kelly Shares Adorable Video Montage of His and Megan Fox's Daughter Saga During Tour Opener: 'Wish I Was With Mine Right Now'. Machine Gun Kelly played a sweet video with daughter Saga onstage during his "Lost Americana" summer tour opener Friday, May 15 at Toyota Amphitheatre in Wheatland, Calif. "Pretty girl right there, is that your dad?" the rocker, who shares the little girl with ex Megan Fox, said as he addressed the audience in the clip posted on a fan's Instagram on Sunday, May 17. I wish I was with mine right now, that's amazing. He launched into the sentimental "Play This When I'm Gone," singing, "Sending you this message just so I can stay that I love you. ## Clips of MGK With Daughter Saga Played. During the clips, MGK is seen dancing with his daughter, and flying a paper airplane with his pink pajama-clad little girl, who is holding onto her dad while he laughs.

recentArticles.title: Magic, mastery and magisterial power: 10 of Sonny Rollins’ greatest recordings - The Guardian
recentArticles.snippet: A 30-year-old Sonny Rollins had already made his unique mark with Miles Davis and Thelonious Monk by the time this 1956 session was cut, just a year after bebop sax revolutionary Charlie Parker’s death – but hooking up with his contemporary and admirer John Coltrane happened by chance on the two-tenor blues chase of this album’s title. In a vivacious set with the Miles Davis rhythm section of the time (Red Garland on piano, Paul Chambers on bass, Philly Joe Jones on drums), the leader’s already unquenchable inventiveness is in full flow on Paul’s Pal, and The Most Beautiful Girl in the World. This writer’s first connection with Sonny Rollins’ music was occasioned not by music but words: poetic New Yorker writer Whitney Balliett’s evocative review of Sonny Rollins’ 1957 Saxophone Colossus, in which he referred to the saxophonist’s guffawing, haranguing improvisational style as springing from a jazz imagination to equal Charlie Parker’s.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容關於爵士樂手Sonny Rollins的音樂成就與錄音作品，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Why Hollywood And The Creator Economy Are Trading Places - Yahoo News UK
recentArticles.snippet: The big story in entertainment right now is creators going Hollywood. The bigger story is mainstream talent quietly going the other way. In a few days A24 is releasing Backrooms, the debut of 20-year-old YouTuber Kane Parsons, which is tracking to open above $25 million. KJ Apa, an actor known for a leading role in Riverdale, is in the middle of one of the year’s wildest creator-economy stunts. It is exactly the asset the rest of mainstream entertainment is quietly trying to build. This isn't the same story, it's two different groups chasing two different things in opposite directions. For the last nine years he has worked with both superstar YouTubers and traditional entertainment celebrities, which makes him one of the only people watching both sides of this migration from the same chair. But right now it’s a touring magician with 100 million monthly views, it’s a 26-year-old YouTuber being handed a horror franchise and it's an established actor pretending to be a TikTok pop star.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞探討好萊塢與創作者經濟之間的趨勢轉變，內容並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Here’s What Went Down at Jay-Z’s Headlining Roots Picnic Show - Pitchfork
recentArticles.snippet: From a diss-laden freestyle to a State Property reunion, the rapper lit up his first top-billed solo performance in over five years. Jay-Z headlined Philadelphia’s annual Roots Picnic on Saturday (March 30), marking his first solo headlining show in over five years. Over the course of the 90-minute set, Jay-Z performed 30-plus songs from across catalog, showing love to big hits (“Dirt Off Your Shoulders,” “Empire State of Mind,” “Run This Town,” “N\*gga’s In Paris”) and deeper cuts (“Can I Live,” “Marcy Me”) alike. The show also featured an unofficial State Property reunion, with Beanie Sigel, Freeway, Peedi Crakk, Memphis Bleek, and Young Gunz all hopping on the mic at various intervals. I’ll really get under ya skin (stab).” (Despite the shade, Jay-Z still performed multiple songs from his and West’s joint album *Watch the Throne*, including “No Church in the Wild” and “Gotta Have It.”).

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Drops Kanye West, Drake, and Nicki Minaj Disses in Fiery Roots Picnic Freestyle - bet.com
recentArticles.snippet: Tyler Perry's The Oval. Tyler Perry's House Of Payne. Hov broke six years of solo concert silence Saturday night at the Roots Picnic in Philadelphia with a four-minute freestyle aimed at his rivals and former friends. The 56-year-old rap mogul, born **Shawn Carter**, broke six years of solo concert silence Saturday night at the Roots Picnic in Philadelphia with a four-minute freestyle aimed at **Kanye West**, **Drake**, **Nicki Minaj**, **Dame Dash**, and singer **Jaguar Wright**. Per Consequence, the most quoted line of the night appeared to be a direct response to Drake's recent "Iceman" track "Janice STFU," on which Drake rapped, "the jig is up" in reference to Jay-Z. Hov fired back: "The jig is up, n\*\*\*a I'm up 10, wrong chart champ, n\*\*\*as looked up to Hov, I never looked up to them.". Her Ken can't even pick they kid, enough of them." He also called out his former Roc-A-Fella partner Dame Dash and **Questlove**'s old introduction to Jaguar Wright, who has spent years publicly criticizing Hov and Beyoncé.

recentArticles.title: The Scottish Waltz with Two Lives – Ashoken Farewell - The Times of Israel
recentArticles.snippet: * You will receive email alerts from this author. You will no longer receive email alerts from this author. # The Scottish Waltz with Two Lives – Ashoken Farewell. *Ashoken  Farewel*l was composed by Jay Ungar, an American Folk Musician and Composer. Ungar observed, “*Ashokan Farewell* was written in the style of a Scottish lament. I sometimes introduce it as, ‘a Scottish lament written by a Jewish guy from the Bronx.’ I lived in the Bronx until the age of sixteen.”. And a love that will always remain in my heart.*. Jay, and his life partner and fellow Folk Musician and Composer, Molly Mason, close their annual Ashoken Center season with *Ashoken Farewell*. The Ashoken Center is a very important part of Jay and Molly’s lives. The Scottish Waltz, *Ashoken Farewell*, composed by Jay Ungar, the nice Jewish boy from the Bronx, truly has two enduring lives.

recentArticles.title: Kanye West Performs For 118,000 In Turkey—Despite Cancellations Over Antisemitic Behavior - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: Kanye West performed to a stadium crowd of more than 100,000 fans in Turkey on Saturday, his first performance in Europe in more than a decade, as the rapper attempts a comeback following immense backlash to his long history of virulent antisemitic remarks, which derailed his career. His concert follows the cancellation of a tour stop in Marseille, France, in April after Marseille Mayor Benoît Payan refused to have the city serve as a “showcase for those who promote hatred and unapologetic Nazism,” and the cancellation of the U.K.’s Wireless Festival after it picked West as a headlining act. West reportedly claimed during his performance in Istanbul that his concert was the “largest stadium performance of all time.” It’s not immediately clear whether West set a new record: Zach Bryan set the record for the largest ticketed audience in U.S. history with just over 112,000 people in attendance for a concert in 2025.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導描述Kanye West在土耳其舉辦演唱會，試圖在反猶言論爭議後復出，但內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Kanye West performs in Istanbul for first time before mammoth crowd of 118,000 - Anadolu Ajansı
recentArticles.snippet: Kanye West performs in Istanbul for first time before mammoth crowd of 118,000. Stadium was at full capacity hours before show as fans gathered to watch Grammy-winning rapper. World-renowned rapper Kanye West performed in Istanbul for the first time on Saturday, drawing a mammoth crowd of some 118,000 fans to Ataturk Olympic Stadium in one of the year’s biggest music events. The concert, organized in cooperation with NTRteam, attracted thousands of visitors from Türkiye as well as the United Kingdom, Germany, France, the Netherlands, Italy, Russia, Poland, and countries across the Middle East. The stadium reached capacity hours before the show as fans gathered to watch the Grammy-winning artist’s long-awaited debut performance in Türkiye. West opened the concert with his song Father and closed the nearly two-hour set with Stronger. Fans joined in throughout the performance, singing along and dancing as applause and chants echoed around the stadium. One of the concert’s most striking features was its stage design, inspired by West’s performances at Los Angeles’ SoFi Stadium.

They not only rise on one of the *Billboard’s* two worldwide tallies, but establish new peaks. 15 tunes by Jackson appear on this week’s Billboard Global Excl. recentArticles.title: Jimmy Kimmel Cries and Calls Adam Carolla His 'Life Partner' at Hollywood Walk of Fame Ceremony - Variety Australia
recentArticles.snippet: # Jimmy Kimmel Cries and Calls Adam Carolla His ‘Life Partner’ at Hollywood Walk of Fame Ceremony: ‘If That Sounds Gay to You, It Was and It Is’. Kimmel began his speech by remembering his first introduction to Carolla, which came in 1994 when the late-night star was working on “Kevin and Bean,” a Los Angeles radio show. The first time Carolla was put on the air, Kimmel recalled his roast; “Adam told ‘Kevin and Bean,’ ‘Jimmy is 160 pounds of pure chiseled steel. And if that sounds gay to you, it was and it is,” he said, to laughter from the audience. “Adam and I, as you probably know, don’t agree much when it comes to politics, but I love him dearly,” said Kimmel. I am proud of him … this is a guy who worked his way up from nothing to become, literally, a millionaire, and if you don’t believe it you’ll hear him say it every single show.”.

recentArticles.title: Drake Beats Michael Jackson's Record for No. 1 Hits - Newser
recentArticles.snippet: # Drake Beats Michael Jackson's Record for No. 1 Hits. Image 1: Newser - Current News - Breaking StoriesImage 2: Newser - Current News - Breaking Stories. Image 46: Drake Beats Michael Jackson's Record for No. 1 Hits. With "Janice STFU" debuting at No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100, Drake now holds the mark for the most chart-topping singles by a solo male artist, _Variety_ reports. *    Fueled by three new albums released May 15—_Iceman_, _Maid of Honour_, and _Habibti_—Drake also sets a new record for most Hot 100 entries in a single week, landing 42 songs on the chart and surpassing Morgan Wallen's previous high of 37. *    On the albums chart, _Iceman_, _Habibti_, and _Maid of Honour_ opened at Nos. 1, 2, and 3, respectively, with _Iceman_ becoming his 15th No. 1 album and giving him the male solo artist record in that category as well, breaking Jay-Z's record.

recentArticles.title: Drake Breaks Records for Most No. 1s Ever on the Billboard Canadian Hot 100 and Canadian Albums Charts - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: The Toronto rapper has passed Justin Bieber and Taylor Swift for most ever No. 1 hits on the Canadian Hot 100 with "Janice STFU," while he surpasses Swift and Céline Dion for most No. 1s ever on the Canadian Albums chart. Drake's blockbuster *Iceman* release has broken multiple Billboard Canadian chart records. The same week that he beat Michael Jackson's record for most No. 1s in the U.S. Drake's "Janice STFU" is his 14th No. 1 song on the Billboard Canadian Hot 100 dated May 30. That marks Drake's 14th chart-topping song since the chart’s inception in 2007, and it breaks a tie with Justin Bieber and Taylor Swift for the most No. 1 songs in Canadian Hot 100 history. **Drake’s 14 Canadian Hot 100 No. 1s**. On the Canadian Albums chart, The Boy has debuted at No. 1 *and* No. 2 this week with **Iceman** and **Maid of Honour*.* His other new album, **Habibti*,* ranks at No. 4.

recentArticles.title: Paul McCartney’s New Solo Album Is Worth the Wait — Review - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: # Paul McCartney’s New Solo Album Is Worth the Wait — Review. Paul McCartney is back with his first solo album in five years, and it's packed with rock goodness. The release, called "The Boys of Dungeon Lane," features a collection of tracks that play as very personal to the Beatles legend. "'The Boys of Dungeon Lane' is not only the first new solo album from Paul McCartney in over five years; it is a revealing collection of never-before shared stories, personal memories and some newly inspired love songs, from one of the most culturally significant figures of our time," a press statement says of the release. The album is arguably his most personal and introspective to date, untold stories that transport the listener back to where it all began.". ## Album Review — Paul McCartney, 'The Boys of Dungeon Lane'. In honor of the set being out, record stores across the country are hosting "The Boys of Dungeon Lane" indie release parties from May 29 to 31.

recentArticles.title: Jae Stephens Says Her New Single "Attaboy!" Will "Kick You in the Teeth" - Teen Vogue
recentArticles.snippet: The 27-year-old artist talks to Teen Vogue about how the track came to life, managing her growing fame, and leveling up from her self-described "Sellout era.". Fresh off the wave of her viral hit “Afterbody,” the 27-year-old pop and R&B singer is leveling up and introducing her fans, aptly called JaeBaes, to a new era with her single “Attaboy!”. “Literally, all I'm doing after this is going to Goodwill, and then I’m making homemade merch,” Stephens tells *Teen Vogue* at the start of our interview. What new world “Attaboy!” signals for the artist has yet to be revealed, but if this newly created (and high-key cryptic) Instagram account welcoming fans to “Auda City” tells us anything, it’s that she is going all-in on the next phase of Jae Stephens––and inviting listeners into the center of her universe. Ahead of the release of "Attaboy!", *Teen Vogue* spoke with Stephens about how the track came together, her internet presence, and how she’s cultivating her growing pop stardom.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於歌手Jae Stephens的新單曲《Attaboy!》及其演藝事業發展，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Self-Help Podcaster Jay Shetty Strikes Major $100 Million Deal With Spotify And Netflix - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: # Self-Help Podcaster Jay Shetty Strikes Major $100 Million Deal With Spotify And Netflix. Murray is a Forbes news reporter covering entertainment trends. ## Topline. Spotify and Netflix struck a deal reportedly worth $100 million for exclusive rights to the video version of “On Purpose,” a self-help podcast hosted by wellness influencer Jay Shetty, a rare nine-figure podcasting contract that is one of Spotify’s biggest since it first signed with Joe Rogan in 2020. ## Key Facts. *This is a developing story. Share confidential information with Forbes.

recentArticles.title: Jay McKee Named Hamilton Hammers Head Coach - NHL.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Jay McKee Named Hamilton Hammers Head Coach. The Islanders announced that Jay McKee has been named Head Coach of the Hamilton Hammers, the Islanders' new AHL affiliate. The New York Islanders announced today that Jay McKee has been named Head Coach of the Hamilton Hammers, the Islanders new American Hockey League affiliate. McKee, 48, takes over as the first Head Coach in Hamilton’s history. He has spent the past three years as Head Coach of the Brantford Bulldogs of the Ontario Hockey League. Last season, McKee led the Brantford to the best record in the OHL (48-10-8-2). Prior to his time in with the Bulldogs organization, McKee spent four seasons (2016-17 through 2019-20) as Head Coach of the Kitchener Rangers and the 2015-16 season as Associate Coach in Kitchener. He spent the 2014-15 season as an Assistant Coach with the Erie Otters (OHL), the 2011-12 season as an Assistant Coach of the Rochester Americans (AHL), and the 2010-11 season as an Assistant Coach at Niagara University (NCAA).
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞報導關於冰球教練Jay McKee被任命為Hamilton Hammers隊的總教練，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Kanye West Set to Kick Off Tour in Istanbul, With Fans Expected to Flock From Countries Where He’s Been Banned - Variety Australia
recentArticles.snippet: # Kanye West Set to Kick Off Tour in Istanbul, With Fans Expected to Flock From Countries Where He’s Been Banned. Kanye West is set to hold a massive concert on Saturday at Istanbul’s Atatürk Olympic Stadium, which will kick off his tour following cancellations in the U.K., France, Switzerland and Poland due to the rapper’s antisemitic remarks. Though the U.K. government blocked Ye from entering the country and several other European nations followed, fans are now travelling to Istanbul from the U.K., the U.S., Germany, Poland, Russia and Kazakhstan to catch the concert, according to organiser Erdem Karahan. Besides several Turkish artists who will open the evening — including Sena Sener, Motive, Lvbel C5, Yener Cevik, Mavi, and Pera — Karahan told Turkish media he expects U.S. rapper Travis Scott to be on stage to perform the pair’s collaborative track “Father” from West’s latest album, “Bully.” North West, Kanye West’s daughter with ex-wife Kim Kardashian, is also expected to perform.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導主要關於肯伊·威斯特（Kanye West）在伊斯坦堡舉辦巡迴演唱會，吸引了來自多國的粉絲，並預計有Travis Scott和North West作為嘉賓演出，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Gracie Abrams announces ‘Look at My Life Tour,’ four NYC shows. Get tickets - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Gracie Abrams announces ‘Look at My Life Tour,’ four NYC shows. Gracie Abrams just announced her ‘Look at My Life Tour’ that will send her to arenas all over North America from December 2026 through March 2027. That includes not one, not two, not three but four (!) concerts at Brooklyn’s Barclays Center with special guest The Japanese House accompanying her on all dates. **Tuesday, March 16, 2027***8 p.m.*. **Wednesday, March 17, 2027***8 p.m.*. **Friday, March 19, 2027***8 p.m.*. **Saturday, March 20, 2027***8 p.m.*. Rachel Chinouriri, Holly Humberstone, Del Water Gap, Charlotte Lawrence, Grace Ives, Bella Kay and Jensen McRae will provide support at other U.S. and Canada ‘Look at My Life Tour’ gigs. Notable tracks to make the cut include “That’s So True,” “I Love You, I’m Sorry,” “I miss you, I’m sorry,” “Risk” and “Close To You.”. | Feb. 18 at the Scotiabank Arena in Toronto, ON, CA |.

recentArticles.title: 2026-05-30 - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: About UsPrivacy PolicyTerms and ConditionsCareers Contact Us. Billboard is a part of Penske Media Corporation. ## Le jeune auteur-compositeur-interprète Alex Sampson fait son entrée dans le palmarès radio de Billboard Canada avec son titre « Misery ». Cette semaine, la jeune auteure-compositrice-interprète canadienne fait son entrée à la 35e place du palmarès radio de Billboard Canada CHR/Top 40 avec son titre « Misery », daté du 23 mai. L'an dernier, l'artiste signé chez Warner Music Canada a fait son entrée dans les palmarès radio avec « Pretty Baby », une ballade aux accents des années 50. Sans doute le titre phare de **Swag II de Bieber —** qui fait suite à son album à succès **Swag** — la chanson s'ouvre sur une mélodie de guitare entraînante et une instrumentation influencée par le hip-hop, pour se transformer en un morceau lumineux et funky où Bieber déborde de confiance et d'ambition.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要報導Alex Sampson及Justin Bieber的音樂成就，並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: "One Last Shopping Cart Ride": The Stars of Jackass: Best and Last Are Bringing Their Final Film's Stunts and Stupidity to IGN Live 2026 - IGN
recentArticles.snippet: # Jackass: Best and Last Stars Confirmed to Attend IGN Live 2026. ## Plus, check out this exclusive new poster for the gang's final movie. The Jackass gang is coming to IGN Live 2026! Steve-O, Wee Man (Jason Acuña), Poopies (Sean McInerney), and Jasper will attend IGN Live on Saturday, June 6th to promote their new movie, Jackass: Best and Last. In addition to this announcement, IGN can also exclusively reveal the new poster for Jackass: Best and Last, which can be seen below. Jackass: Best and Last marks Johnny Knoxville and the gang’s “final fling at the big screen,” according to the movie’s official synopsis:. Jackass: Best and Last opens in theaters on June 26. IGN Live 2026 is a multi-day celebration of video games and entertainment that will take place at the Magic Box @ The Reef in downtown Los Angeles on June 6 - 7 from 9 am - 5 pm PT.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要關於《Jackass: Best and Last》電影及其演員將出席IGN Live 2026的宣傳活動，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Harry Styles Wears a Zoë Kravitz Fave for a Night Out With Rosalía - Vogue
recentArticles.snippet: # Harry Styles Wears a Zoë Kravitz Fave for a Night Out With Rosalía. Peer-judged, it’s a night where some of the buzziest emerging and most formidable established artists come together. Styles hopped over the English Channel from his multi-night Together, Together tour residency in Amsterdam for the occasion—already, a history-making, record-breaking event. Styles was a surprise guest, and presented Radiohead frontman Thom Yorke with the highest accolade of the night, the Academy Fellowship. On tour, Harry Styles—styled by Harry Lambert—has been sporting a variety of custom looks in primary colors with fun accessories: a bow-adorned Valentino blazer by his friend Alessandro Michele, a custom blue, orange, yellow combo from Prada and Cartier, and a groovy floral neck-tie and sculptural pants care of Celine. * Listen to *The Run-Through with Vogue*, a weekly podcast featuring the most exciting stories and hot takes from the worlds of culture, politics, sports and–of course–fashion.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Harry Styles的時尚穿搭與活動，未提及周杰倫相關資訊。

recentArticles.title: Scooter Braun vs. the World - The Free Press
recentArticles.snippet: EXCLUSIVE: Scooter Braun Tells His Side of the Taylor Swift Masters War. I spoke to the former mega-manager about working with Kanye West, how management is like parenting, and about being cast as the villain in Taylor Swift’s fairy tale: ‘I legitimately don’t know her.’. ***In case you missed the news, The Free Press has a new culture podcast. It’s called “Second Thought,” and it’s hosted by Suzy Weiss. You might know him as the guy who discovered Justin Bieber, or as the superagent cast as a villain by Taylor Swift, or as Sydney Sweeney’s new squeeze. Braun, who I recently interviewed in Los Angeles for my podcast *Second Thought*, told me he saw explosive talent in the young Bieber—“He was charismatic, he was brave”—and envisioned him as the 21st century’s answer to a young Michael Jackson; a kid, soulfully singing love songs for the masses.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞主要報導Scooter Braun與Taylor Swift的爭議，內容未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Early 2000s star brings first solo album in more than a decade to Oakland - sfchronicle.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Early 2000s star brings first solo album in more than a decade to Oakland. Juvenile is bringing Oakland back to the early 2000s with his forthcoming concert at the Fox Theater. The New Orleans rapper, whose real name is Terius Gray, rose to fame in the late 1990s with hits such as “Slow Motion,” “Back That Azz Up” and “Ha.” He’s widely regarded as a pioneer of Southern hip-hop and contributed to the rise of Cash Money Records, with which he worked both as a solo artist and as part of the collective Hot Boys. Returning to the stage with his first full-length solo project in more than a decade, “Boiling Point,” the musician performs in Oakland on June 5. Zara Irshad is the Chronicle's Arts & Entertainment Engagement Reporter. She joined the Chronicle as a summer 2023 intern for the Datebook team. She previously interned for the San Diego Union-Tribune and wrote for her campus newspaper, the Guardian, where she served as editor-in-chief.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞是關於饒舌歌手Juvenile的演唱會與新專輯，與周杰倫無關。
